title: SaaSContractIntake
description: Schema for triaging and validating incoming SaaS customer or vendor contracts.

requestOwner.description: The name or email of the internal business sponsor/owner of the request.

customer.description: The name of the customer organization.

contractType.description: The type of the agreement being submitted.

dealStage.description: The current stage of the business deal.

requestedDeadline.description: The date by which the review is requested (YYYY-MM-DD).

customerSector.description: The industry sector of the customer (e.g. Healthcare, Finance, Fintech, Retail, Tech).

regulatedCustomer.description: Whether the customer is a regulated entity (e.g. governed by HIPAA, BaFin, SEC, FCA, DORA).

deploymentModel.description: How the SaaS software is deployed for the customer.

dataCategories.description: Categories of data that will be processed (e.g. IP addresses, emails, healthcare data, credit card information).

aiFeaturesInvolved.description: List of AI features or modules the customer will use (e.g. Agentic Search, RAG Co-Pilot, automated drafting).

modelOrVendorProvidersInvolved.description: Sub-processors or underlying model vendors involved (e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini).

nonStandardTerms.description: Any requested deviations from standard terms (e.g. uncapped liability, custom IP rights, custom audits).

redFlags.description: Identified risks or non-starters during initial review (e.g. class action waivers, aggressive indemnities).

businessPosition.description: The commercial context or business reasoning for accepting non-standard terms.

legalQuestion.description: Specific question or issue submitted for Legal Counsel review.
